title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LUCBAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABULUG, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2361 / 55 OG No. 37, 7883 (September 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2497, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LUCBAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABULUG, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Lucban in the Municipality of Abulug, Province of Cagayan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Lucban.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
